title: Simulation code for "Real-Time AI Service Economy: A Framework for Agentic Computing Across the Continuum"
description: R + targets pipeline reproducing the experiments in the IEEE Transactions on Services Computing paper "Real-Time AI Service Economy: A Framework for Agentic Computing Across the Continuum": the topology x load ablation grid, the DSIC strategic-bidding test, a measured agentic LLM workload, and the integrator faithfulness and encapsulation-overhead studies. Reproduce all results with targets::tar_make().
